name: Prompt Management & Optimization
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Versioned prompt template storage — JSON/YAML files with Git-like versioning via blob snapshots

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Prompt management API — CRUD, versioning, A/B assignment, evaluation triggers

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Prompt metadata, A/B test configs, evaluation results, usage analytics per template

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: Prompt evaluation and optimization — test prompts against golden datasets

enterprise.note: GPT-4o + GPT-4o-mini, batch eval at scale

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Background jobs — prompt evaluation pipelines, A/B traffic splitting, metric aggregation

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys for OpenAI, Cosmos DB connection strings, prompt signing keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Prompt performance tracking — latency, token usage, A/B test outcome metrics

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for bulk prompt evaluations — 95% cheaper than GPT-4o with comparable ranking quality
Enable Blob Storage lifecycle management — move old prompt versions to Cool tier after 30 days
Use Cosmos DB serverless for dev — no idle cost, pay only for eval runs
Batch prompt evaluations during off-peak hours — lower token contention, faster throughput
Cache frequently-accessed prompts in Container Apps memory — reduces Blob Storage reads by 80%
Use Container Apps scale-to-zero for dev — eliminates compute cost when not actively developing prompts
